tools.name: get_price_coin
tools.description: Current USD spot price and 24-hour percent change for any crypto asset by CoinGecko id. Cheap, high-volume price lookups for trading and analytics agents. ($0.001 per call, paid via x402)

tools.name: get_report_coin
tools.description: Enriched crypto market report for one asset: rank, multi-timeframe price changes (1h/24h/7d/30d), all-time-high context, plain-English momentum/volatility/liquidity signals, and a ready-to-use written summary. For agents needing market context, not just a price. ($0.02 per call, paid via x402)

tools.name: get_orderbook
tools.description: L2 ORDER-BOOK DEPTH — the live bid/ask ladder for any crypto pair, normalized across Coinbase, Binance.US and Kraken (auto-fallback, or pick a source). Returns bids/asks to your depth plus the analytics that matter: mid, spread (absolute + bps), book liquidity per side, and slippage estimates for $1

tools.name: get_scrape
tools.description: Fetch any public web page and return clean, readable Markdown with navigation, ads, and boilerplate stripped. For agents that need article text or documentation as Markdown. ($0.001 per call, paid via x402)

tools.name: get_summarize
tools.description: Quick extractive summary of any web page: fetch the URL, extract the main article, and return the key sentences (TextRank) instead of the full text. For agents that want the gist of a page, not a full scrape. No AI — fast and deterministic. ($0.002 per call, paid via x402)

tools.name: get_timezone
tools.description: Timezone from GPS coordinates: IANA zone, current UTC offset, abbreviation, DST status, and local time for any lat/lng. Fast offline lookup (approximate near borders). Pairs with the IP-geolocation endpoint for analytics and scheduling agents. ($0.001 per call, paid via x402)

tools.name: post_llm
tools.description: LLM INFERENCE for keyless agents — POST {prompt, system?} and get Claude Haiku's answer: summarize, classify, extract, rewrite, translate, draft. No API key, no account, no subscription — the x402 payment IS the auth. One flat price per call. Caps: 8,000-char prompt, 2,000-char system, ~1,000-token

tools.name: get_calc
tools.description: Exact math for agents — the arithmetic LLMs get plausibly wrong. Evaluates an expression at 50-significant-digit precision (BigNumber): big-integer multiplication, high-precision division, roots, logs, factorials, unit conversions (12 inch to cm). GET ?expr=…, result returned as an exact string. Det

tools.name: post_calc_stats
tools.description: Exact descriptive statistics — LLMs cannot reliably sum 200 numbers; this can. POST {values:[…]} for count/sum/mean/median/stddev/percentiles; {x:[],y:[]} for Pearson correlation + linear regression; {rows:[…], field} for object arrays — or {collection, field?} to run stats DIRECTLY ON YOUR DATASTOR

tools.name: get_calc_dates
tools.description: Exact date arithmetic — the calendar math LLMs guess at. ?from=&to= → days, business days, weeks, hours between; ?date=&add=30d|2w|3m|1y|10bd → the resulting date (bd = business days); ?date= alone → weekday, ISO week, day-of-year, leap year, unix. All UTC, Mon-Fri business days, real-calendar valid

tools.name: post_calc_finance
tools.description: Exact financial + token math. POST {op:…}: compound (growth with per-period contributions), amortize (payment, total interest, schedule), npv, irr (deterministic bisection) — and token_units: exact decimal↔base-unit conversion via BigInt for any token decimals (ETH 18, USDC 6), the 18-decimal math t

tools.name: get_convert
tools.description: Live crypto conversion at CoinGecko prices: any coin to any coin or fiat, and fiat to coin. ?amount=0.5&from=bitcoin&to=ethereum — common tickers (btc, eth, sol…) accepted. Returns the rate, the converted amount, and the underlying prices. Prices cached ≤30s; cheap enough to call in a loop. ($0.001

tools.name: get_geo
tools.description: IP geolocation: country, region, city, coordinates, and timezone for any IPv4 or IPv6 address. Fast in-memory lookup for analytics, fraud, and personalization agents. ($0.001 per call, paid via x402)

tools.name: get_ping
tools.description: Cheapest liveness ping: ONE request to any public URL — is anything answering, and how fast? Returns up/down, HTTP status, and latency in ms. Any HTTP response below 500 counts as up; redirects are reported, not followed. High-frequency monitoring loops belong here; step up to /api/uptime for redire

tools.name: get_uptime
tools.description: Uptime/health probe for any public URL: sends a HEAD request (auto GET fallback when the server refuses HEAD), follows redirects with per-hop safety checks, and returns up/down, HTTP status, latency in ms, redirect chain, final URL, and key response headers. Deterministic, no page download — a monit

tools.name: get_uptime_report

tools.name: get_platform

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_scrape, get_summarize, post_llm, get_ping, get_uptime, get_platform, get_email_verify, get_og_check, post_og_card, get_a11y_contrast, get_seo_robots_check, get_seo_metadata, get_seo_head_check, get_seo_sitemap_check, get_seo_nav, get_seo_links, get_seo_full_audit, get_music_album, get_extract, get_icon_search, post_icon_generate, post_logo_generate, post_vectorize, post_website_page, get_wp_assess, get_dns, post_lint_elixir, post_lint_javascript, post_lint_php, post_lint_liquid, post_liquid_section, get_seo_site_audit, post_brand_kit, post_scratchpad_name, post_search, get_board · Private data: post_llm, post_calc_stats, post_calc_finance, get_seo_sitemap_check, get_music_album, get_extract, get_dns, post_website_build, post_store_collection, get_store_collection, get_store, delete_store_collection, post_scratchpad_name, get_scratchpad_name, get_scratchpad, delete_scratchpad_name, post_search, post_v1_chat_completions, post_v1_pro_chat_completions, post_v1_messages, post_board_intro · Public sink: post_llm, post_calc_stats, post_calc_finance, post_schema_audit, get_email_verify, get_og_check, post_og_card, get_icon_search, post_icon_generate, post_logo_generate, post_vectorize, post_website_page, get_dns, post_schema_generate, post_lint_elixir, post_lint_javascript, post_lint_php, post_lint_liquid, post_liquid_section, post_brand_kit, post_website_build, post_store_collection, post_scratchpad_name, post_board, post_board_sticky, post_chat, post_search, post_v1_chat_completions, post_v1_pro_chat_completions, post_v1_messages, post_board_intro, get_board · Destructive: post_calc_stats, get_og_check, post_lint_php, post_liquid_section, get_seo_site_audit, get_store_collection, delete_store_collection, delete_scratchpad_name.

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

confidence.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
confidence.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_scrape, get_summarize, get_website_screenshot, post_llm, get_ping, get_uptime, get_platform, get_email_verify, get_og_check, post_og_card, get_qr, get_a11y_contrast, get_seo_robots_check, get_seo_metadata, get_seo_head_check, get_seo_sitemap_check, get_seo_nav, get_seo_links, get_seo_full_audit, get_music_album, get_extract, get_icon_search, post_icon_generate, post_logo_generate, post_vectorize, post_website_page, get_wp_assess, get_dns, post_lint_elixir, post_lint_javascript, post_lint_php, post_lint_liquid, post_liquid_section, get_seo_site_audit, post_brand_kit, post_scratchpad_name, post_search, post_describe_image, post_translate_text, post_summarize_text, get_board, get_pulse · Private data: post_llm, post_calc_stats, post_calc_finance, get_seo_sitemap_check, get_music_album, get_extract, get_dns, post_website_build, post_store_collection, get_store_collection, get_store, delete_store_collection, post_scratchpad_name, get_scratchpad_name, get_scratchpad, delete_scratchpad_name, post_search, post_v1_chat_completions, post_v1_pro_chat_completions, post_v1_messages, post_board_intro · Public sink: post_llm, post_calc_stats, post_calc_finance, post_schema_audit, get_email_verify, get_og_check, post_og_card, get_icon_search, post_icon_generate, post_logo_generate, post_vectorize, post_website_page, get_dns, post_schema_generate, post_lint_elixir, post_lint_javascript, post_lint_php, post_lint_liquid, post_liquid_section, post_brand_kit, post_website_build, post_store_collection, post_scratchpad_name, post_board, post_board_sticky, post_chat, post_search, post_describe_image, post_translate_text, post_summarize_text, post_v1_chat_completions, post_v1_pro_chat_completions, post_v1_messages, post_board_intro, get_board, get_pulse · Destructive: get_website_screenshot, post_calc_stats, get_og_check, post_lint_php, post_liquid_section, get_seo_site_audit, get_store_collection, delete_store_collection, delete_scratchpad_name.

confidence.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
